data.current_description: Lists WhatsApp bots and templates with pagination.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of WhatsApp bots and their associated templates. Supports pagination via limit and offset parameters. Returns a list of bot configurations with template details.
data.reasoning: Description is too brief and lacks clarity about pagination parameters and return structure. Added details about pagination support and what is returned to improve AI agent understanding of available parameters and response format.

message: Operation 'sendWhatsAppTemplateMessage' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks specificity about required inputs, what the operation returns, and side effects. Enhanced with details about required fields, return value (message ID), and delivery mechanism to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Sends a WhatsApp template message to a recipient.
data.description_suggestion: Sends a WhatsApp template message to a specified recipient. Requires a valid template ID and recipient phone number in the request. Returns confirmation of message delivery with a message ID. The message is queued for delivery through WhatsApp's messaging service.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks specificity about required inputs, what the operation returns, and side effects. Enhanced with details about required fields, return value (message ID), and delivery mechanism to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Lists all webhook subscriptions with pagination.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of webhook subscriptions with optional filtering. Supports pagination via limit and offset parameters. Returns a list of webhook subscription objects containing endpoint URLs, event types, and subscription status.
data.reasoning: Summary uses 'search' but description says 'lists all', creating inconsistency. Description lacks details about pagination parameters and return structure. Updated summary to clarify filtering capability and enhanced description with pagination details and response structure.

Enhanced to clarify partial update support and specify that the updated subscription object is returned.

data.current_description: Updates properties of an existing webhook subscription.
data.description_suggestion: Updates configuration properties of an existing webhook subscription identified by webhookSubscriptionId. Supports partial updates - only provided fields will be modified. Returns the updated webhook subscription object with all current properties.
data.reasoning: Description is vague about what properties can be updated and whether partial updates are supported. Missing details about return value. Enhanced to clarify partial update support and specify that the updated subscription object is returned.

message: Operation 'deleteWebhookSubscription' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks important context about side effects (subscription stops receiving events) and what is returned. Added details about the permanent nature of deletion and that webhook events will no longer be delivered to help AI agents understand the consequences of this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Deletes a webhook subscription identified by webhookSubscriptionId. Once deleted, the subscription will no longer receive webhook events. Returns a success confirmation. This action is permanent and cannot be undone.
data.reasoning: Description lacks important context about side effects (subscription stops receiving events) and what is returned. Added details about the permanent nature of deletion and that webhook events will no longer be delivered to help AI agents understand the consequences of this operation.

message: Operation 'createWebhookSubscription' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description is too vague about required inputs and what happens after creation. Missing details about return value and side effects. Enhanced to specify required fields (endpoint URL, event types), return value (subscription object with ID), and that the subscription becomes active immediately.

data.current_description: Creates a webhook subscription for events.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new webhook subscription to receive event notifications. Requires a webhook endpoint URL and event types to subscribe to in the request. Returns the created webhook subscription object with a unique webhookSubscriptionId. The subscription becomes active immediately and will begin receiving matching events.
data.reasoning: Description is too vague about required inputs and what happens after creation. Missing details about return value and side effects. Enhanced to specify required fields (endpoint URL, event types), return value (subscription object with ID), and that the subscription becomes active immediately.

data.current_description: Initiates a robocall to a specified phone number.

Requires a valid phone number and robocall configuration ID in the request body. Returns a call task object with a unique call ID and status.
